scenarios.description: sourceRange delegates to parent.sourceRange when parent is non-null
scenarios.precondition: Attributes stubParent overrides sourceRange to return a known Range.AttributeRange
scenarios.expectedResult: same Range.AttributeRange instance returned by stubParent.sourceRange
pseudocode: TEST TC02 sourceRange delegates to non-null parent
// Arrange stub parent with predictable sourceRange behavior
Range.AttributeRange expected = new Range.AttributeRange(new Range.Position(1), new Range.Position(2));
